analysis.summary: The candidate demonstrates a strong technical alignment with the core requirements of the Canadian market sample, specifically showing proficiency in the most frequently requested tools: SQL, Python, and BI software. While technical skills are a match, the profile leans toward junior or internship experience, which may require additional emphasis on business impact to secure more senior roles.
matchedStrengths: Proficiency in the primary tech stack (SQL, Python, Excel)
Versatility in both Tableau and Power BI visualization tools
Direct experience communicating with Product and Operations teams
End-to-end data workflow experience from cleaning to reporting
missingSignals: Quantifiable business impact or metrics from projects
Exposure to data governance or data quality frameworks
Experience with 'source-of-truth' dataset curation or ETL pipelines
Professional/Industry experience beyond academic or internship settings
resumeSuggestions: Quantify the results of your dashboards (e.g., 'reduced manual reporting time by X hours')
Specify which Python libraries (Pandas, NumPy) were used to demonstrate technical depth
Detail a specific data cleaning challenge you solved to align with 'data governance' needs in Job da-4
Mention the scale of datasets handled to demonstrate capability for 'complex datasets' mentioned by TheAILabb

jobMatches.title: Data Analyst
jobMatches.reason: Direct overlap with SQL, dashboarding, and the requirement to partner with product/operations teams.

jobMatches.title: Data Analyst
